markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is ramping up content production, aiming for 10+ articles/week and 5 content refreshes/week](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Strategy focuses on building topic clusters, expanding on high-performing keywords, and filling keyword gaps](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Webstacks team seeking more visibility into strategy and progress; GrowthX to provide more data-driven updates](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Both teams aligned on prioritizing getting content published quickly to gather performance data](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress and Strategy

  - [Currently in week 3-4 of engagement; 10 articles published so far](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Aiming for 20 more articles to be published by next week (30 total)](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Targeting 45 articles by week 4, ramping up to 60-80 articles in the first month](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Using 3 keyword strategies: land and expand, keyword gap analysis, and paid ad keywords](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Building topic clusters (e.g., website localization, website migration) for SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Prioritizing use cases and high-converting keywords from Webstacks' existing data](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Content Review and Optimization Process

  - [GrowthX recommends reviewing articles after 2-3 weeks once traffic data is available](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Using SEO Testing tool to track performance improvements for refreshed and new content](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Initial focus on improving articles with impressions but no clicks](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Adding conversion panels, CTAs, and relevant downloadable assets to articles](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)

### Data and Reporting

  - [GrowthX to provide weekly updates on content performance using SEO Testing tool](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Tracking improvements in impressions, clicks, and conversions at article level](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [First significant results expected in months 2-3 of the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Webstacks team to provide feedback on article topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [GrowthX to share access to Airtable for more visibility into content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Both teams to use Slack for quick communication on any blockers or questions](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to publish 20 more articles by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Webstacks to complete image creation for 10 blogs](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=2382.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide data-driven update in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Webstacks to inform GrowthX about upcoming CMS transition (estimated 1 month out)](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)
  - [Schedule walkthrough of new CMS with Sidera and Andrej when ready](https://fathom.video/share/K2QqK5-Lvxj8My_BMihgntsfDzwV7Rrq?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
